subject: str-3ky9.17: strace-based dep discovery tool
description: Add optional `shatter discover-deps --strace` command that uses strace to catalog all network syscalls (connect, sendto, sendmsg, socket ~10-15 syscalls) made by a function. One-shot diagnostic tool, not for runtime interception. Works on Linux. See `bd show str-3ky9.17` for full details.
